description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with clean lines and a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with a prominent main building and several attached or adjacent sections, including what appears to be a garage or auxiliary space. The exterior showcases a combination of light and dark materials, likely concrete, wood, and glass, with large window panels providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by landscaped green areas and paved walkways, and a visible swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor space. A covered porch or veranda extends from the main entrance, offering a sheltered outdoor area. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between living, recreational, and utility zones.
description: A modern, multi-volume bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, landscaped grounds, and a visible pool and porch.
description_view_0: Front-facing view highlighting the main entrance, porch, and a clear view of the pool and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view showing the elongated structure, garage or auxiliary section, and the arrangement of windows and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear or angled view emphasizing the backyard, green space, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the building, the pool area, and the integration of different roof heights.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and side panels
